clue: Mom bottles gas on the counter, gives signature
explanation: ARGON is a gas. To put a word "on the counter" is to reverse it. MOM bottles NOGRA, giving MO(NOGRA)M. MONOGRAM, a kind of signature.
hints: What might it mean to put a word "on the counter"?
"Gives" links the wordplay and definition. The definition is "signature".
We need the name of a gas, that can be reversed and contained in the word "MOM". The answer will be a word meaning "signature".
